reasoning: XLK +1.28% leading the move while XLE -0.51% and XLF flat confirms risk-on rotation into growth. Tech sector is outperforming SPY (1.28% vs 0.78%), indicating somewhat narrow leadership. XLF's lack of participation (-0.15%) limits full breadth confirmation, but the directional signal is clear: growth/tech preference, no defensive rotation. Medium-confidence bullish bias on sector internals alone.
key_observations: XLK: +1.28% — strong tech leadership, well above 0.5% threshold
XLF: -0.15% — essentially flat, not contributing to breadth
XLE: -0.51% — down while XLK up = classic risk-on (growth preferred over defensive)
overall rotation: Clear risk-on into growth; tech leading but not broad-based (only 1 of 3 major sectors >0.5%)
